top_signals.title: US Treasury sanctions over 100 ISIS-K crypto addresses that moved over $1.4 million
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Takaichi Eyes India Ties as Relations With China Fray
top_signals.summary: Exchange rates of both Japan and India are under pressure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Official Statistics: HM Treasury Statistics: Timetable, standards and policies
top_signals.summary: HM Treasury's statistics are governed by the standards set out by the UK Statistics Authority in their Code of Practice for accredited official statistics.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SoftBank plans to rent AI compute in U.S. at 10-gigawatt scale
top_signals.summary: The mobile carrier operator and group company will set up the new venture this month, aiming to supply data center capacity at a scale of 10 gigawatts by around 2030.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Inside Japan’s $25 billion consumer market built on fan devotion
top_signals.summary: From collecting Hello Kitty goods to manga figurines, what was once considered a niche hobby has evolved into a fan-merchandising economy estimated to be worth ¥4.1 trillion.

top_signals.title: NBA to test ‘one free throw’ rule in Summer League games
top_signals.summary: Under the rule, one free throw would be worth the same total number of points as the free throws it replaces.
